name: Parmesan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the breadcrumbs and Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
2. Dip each piece of chicken into the mustard mixture, coating it thoroughly.
3. Roll the coated chicken pieces in the breadcrumb mixture until evenly covered.
4. Place the chicken on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
6. Serve hot or cold. This dish is elegant and versatile, with options to experiment using different types of mustard or breadcrumbs.
(from David Sawyer)
